---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new backend, Android, or workflow feature
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature in one short paragraph.

## Goal

What user or developer problem does this solve?

## Area

- [ ] backend
- [ ] android
- [ ] docs/workflow
- [ ] build/tooling

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the intended behavior.

## Acceptance Signals

- what should be visible or testable when the feature is done

## Risks / Constraints

- API compatibility
- runtime behavior
- persistence
- UI complexity
- verification cost

## Plugin Workflow

- `GitHub` should be used for repo context
- `Superpowers` should be used if the feature spans multiple areas
- `CodeRabbit` review should be requested for risky changes
- `Test Android Apps` should be used if Android behavior is user-visible

## Extra Context

Add links, screenshots, or notes if needed.
